tools.name: data_validate_json
tools.description: Use this when you need to validate JSON syntax or validate JSON data against a JSON Schema. Returns validity status, parse errors, formatted JSON, and structure stats (depth, key count, arrays, total size). Do NOT use for password checking — use security_check_password. Do NOT use for hash generatio

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "data_validate_json" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
